scenario: Validate curated list of relaxation and meditation resources loads within 30 seconds
steps: Launch the app
Wait for 30 seconds
Verify the curated list of relaxation and meditation resources is displayed
expected_result: The curated list of relaxation and meditation resources is displayed within 30 seconds of launching the app

scenario: Validate curated list of relaxation and meditation resources loads within 3 seconds for 90% of users
steps: Load the homepage
Measure the time taken for the curated list of relaxation and meditation resources to load
Repeat steps 1-2 for a statistically significant sample of users (e.g., 1000 users)
expected_result: The curated list of relaxation and meditation resources loads within 3 seconds for at least 900 out of 1000 users (90% success rate)

scenario: Validation of personalized relaxation program generation time
steps: Simulate a user completing a stress assessment survey
Verify that the system generates a personalized relaxation program within 5 minutes
Measure the time taken to generate the relaxation program

scenario: Validate personalized relaxation program access after completing 5 sessions within 2 weeks
steps: User completes 5 relaxation sessions within a 2-week period
User logs in to the system
User navigates to the relaxation program section
expected_result: The system provides access to a personalized relaxation program without prompting for payment

steps: Simulate user data collection for 30 days to establish a baseline sleep pattern
Configure the system to provide personalized sleep recommendations
Collect and record user's sleep data for 30 nights after receiving recommendations
Calculate the number of nights the user fell asleep within 30 minutes of their desired bedtime
expected_result: The user fell asleep within 30 minutes of their desired bedtime for at least 80% of the 30 nights (24 or more nights out of 30)

steps: Simulate user setting a desired bedtime
Generate 10 nights of sleep data with varying sleep quality
Provide personalized sleep recommendations for each night
Calculate the number of nights where user falls asleep within 30 minutes of desired bedtime
expected_result: User falls asleep within 30 minutes of desired bedtime for at least 8 out of 10 nights (80% success rate)

scenario: Validate navigation to meditation content within 3 seconds
steps: Launch the meditation app
Select a meditation session
Record the time taken to navigate to the meditation content
Repeat steps 2-3 for 10 user interactions
expected_result: The app navigates to the meditation content within 3 seconds for at least 9 out of 10 user interactions

scenario: Validate navigation to meditation content within 3 seconds
steps: Launch the meditation app
Select a meditation session
Record the time taken to navigate to the meditation content
Repeat steps 2-3 for 10 user interactions
expected_result: The app navigates to the meditation content within 3 seconds for at least 9 out of 10 user interactions

scenario: Validate clear display of subscription fees and charges
steps: Navigate to the payment page
Select a subscription plan
Review the payment summary before confirming payment
expected_result: The system displays a detailed breakdown of all subscription fees and charges, including the total amount to be paid.

scenario: Validate clear display of charges and fees before subscription payment
steps: Navigate to the subscription page
Select a subscription plan
Review the subscription details without proceeding to payment
expected_result: The system displays a clear and detailed breakdown of all charges and fees associated with the subscription, including but not limited to the subscription fee, taxes, and any additional fees.
